title: Tritom – data intermediation service for food chain operators
description: A practice abstract presenting Tritom, a data intermediation service for the entire food chain that enables farmers and service providers to license and share data generated by tractors, robots, accounting systems, and silos. The service fosters a transparent data ecosystem aligned with the EU data strategy to improve sustainability, efficiency, and profitability, and supports value-adding applications like carbon accounting and product traceability.
